context: Realistic: localStorage preferences parsed without validation cause type errors in distant code

checklist.name: Catches unsafe localStorage parsing
checklist.description: Identifies that preferences loaded from localStorage are not validated for type correctness — a corrupted or version-mismatched stored value (e.g., string where number expected) causes silent failures or NaN in downstream calculations

checklist.name: Risk classified yellow or higher
checklist.description: PR is classified as yellow or higher — it adds persistent state that can cause runtime errors
